Bootstrap Rank Stability.finding: Drug rankings stable: 100%F/0%F drugs have SD<1.0, strongly anti-correlated with n_signals (rho=-0.554)

AE Specificity Index.finding: 85 AEs perfectly specific (spec=1.0), graft-vs-host always F, gingival pain always M

12-Cluster Drug Fingerprints.finding: 641 drugs cluster into 12 distinct sex-bias fingerprint groups (antiviral, oncology, psychiatric)

67.7% Holdout Accuracy.finding: Drug sex-bias direction predictable: 67.7% accuracy vs 50% random baseline

Neuroactive Ligand Largest Gap.finding: Neuroactive ligand-receptor pathway has highest weighted gender gap (221K)

Pathway Similarity Weak Predictor.finding: Same-pathway drugs differ by 40pp+ (rho=-0.073 for similarity vs bias diff)

v5.2 Publication Stats.finding: 217,993 nodes, 3,194,017 edges, 96,281 signals, 15 node types, 31 edge types

6:1 Male Pure Asymmetry.finding: 35 drugs with 0%F but only 6 with 100%F — asymmetric pure sex-bias
